Account Executive

Location

North America

Employment Type

Full time

Location Type

Remote

Department

Sales

Compensation

  • United StatesOTE $130K – $155K • Offers Equity • Offers Commission
  • CanadaOTE $117K – $139.5K • Offers Equity • Offers Commission • listed salary range in USD

Our salary ranges are competitive for our industry and company size. We take a thoughtful approach to compensation, which includes base pay, equity, benefits, and the potential for growth over time. Offers are based on various factors, including experience, skills, location, and internal equity—and are expected to fall within our posted ranges.
